title: NebulaExp-8B: An Empirical Post-Training Pipeline via Full-Scale Ablation Research
abstract: arXiv:2606.26671v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Post-training alignment determines the reasoning and human preference following capabilities of large language models, yet most existing works withhold detailed data construction, filtering rules and training recipes, which hinders community reproducibility and lightweight model optimization. This work presents NebulaExp, a fully transparent, ablation-driven post-training pipeline built on Qwen3-8B-base, covering two orthogonal model branches: general instruct model and complex reasoning-specialized model. We curate a raw corpus of 3.84M multi-source SFT samples and a 200K verifiable RL candidate pool, and design an end-to-end data processing stack including response distillation, multi-dimensional cross-verification filtering, fine-grained difficulty grading, task classification and diversity-aware sampling. For the Instruct branch, our three-stage optimized supervised fine-tuning approach NebulaExp-Ins-SFT improves the average benchmar

Title: NebulaExp-8B: An Empirical Post-Training Pipeline via Full-Scale Ablation Research
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26671v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: Post-training alignment determines the reasoning and human preference following capabilities of large language models, yet most existing works withhold detailed data construction, filtering rules and training recipes, which hinders community reproducibility and lightweight model optimization. This work presents NebulaExp, a fully transparent, ablation-driven post-training pipeline built on Qwen3-8B-base, covering two orthogonal model branches: general instruct model and complex reasoning-specialized model. We curate a raw corpus of 3.84M multi-source SFT samples and a 200K verifiable RL candidate pool, and design an end-to-end data processing stack including response distillation, multi-dimensional cross-verification filtering, fine-grained difficulty grading, task classification and diversity-aware sampling. For the Instruct branch, our three-stage optimized supervised fine-tuning approach NebulaExp-Ins-SFT improves the average benchmar
translated_title: NebulaExp-8B：基于全规模消融研究的实证后训练流程
translated_abstract: arXiv:2606.26671v1 公告类型：新文 摘要：后训练对齐决定了大型语言模型的推理能力和遵循人类偏好的能力，然而现有大多数工作未公开详细的数据构建、过滤规则和训练方法，这阻碍了社区的可复现性和轻量级模型优化。本研究提出了NebulaExp，一个完全透明、基于消融实验的后训练流程，基于Qwen3-8B-base构建，涵盖两个正交的模型分支：通用指令模型和复杂推理专用模型。我们整理了一个包含384万条多源SFT样本的原始语料库和一个20万条可验证的强化学习候选池，并设计了一个端到端的数据处理堆栈，包括响应蒸馏、多维度交叉验证过滤、细粒度难度分级、任务分类和多样性感知采样。对于指令分支，我们采用三阶段优化的监督微调方法NebulaExp-Ins-SFT，在平均基准测试上取得了提升。
tldr: 本研究提出了一个完全透明、基于消融实验的后训练流程NebulaExp，通过精细的数据处理堆栈和两分支模型设计，显著提升了模型的指令遵循和复杂推理能力。
en_tdlr: This work introduces NebulaExp, a fully transparent, ablation-driven post-training pipeline that significantly enhances instruction-following and complex reasoning capabilities through a refined data processing stack and two-branch model design.
